---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability for a future release
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
Besa is a focused trust layer for AI-agent tool calls. Before filing, ask:

  Does this improve signed AI-agent execution control, verification,
  admission, receipts, grants, or local tamper-evident evidence?

If the answer is no, the request probably does not belong in Besa — see
"Non-goals" below and the roadmap in README.md.

Do NOT include secrets, private keys, or customer/production data.
-->

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do, and why can't you do it with Besa today? -->

## Use case

<!-- A concrete scenario. Who is affected, and how often does this come up? -->

## Affected artifact / surface

<!-- Which part of Besa: manifest, signature, trust store, admission policy,
receipt, grant set, CLI, SDK, or the CI gate? -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What would the feature look like? A CLI command, SDK call, manifest or
receipt field, policy rule, etc. -->

## Why this belongs in Besa

<!-- How does it strengthen signed execution control, verification, admission,
receipts, grants, or local evidence? -->

## Security / trust impact

<!-- Does it change what is signed, verified, trusted, or admitted? Could it
weaken any fail-closed guarantee? -->

## Backward compatibility

<!-- Would existing signed manifests, receipts, trust stores, and rotation
proofs remain verifiable? Is this additive or breaking? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches, workarounds, or existing tools you evaluated. -->

## Non-goals

<!-- What this request is explicitly NOT asking for. Besa is not a dashboard,
hosted service, billing system, or general AI-security platform in this scope. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, references, prior art. No secrets or customer data. -->
